content:
# Playwright E2E Suite Plan

## Test Tiers
- PR smoke: fastest browser coverage for public routes, auth redirects, and one protected-route shell.
- Full E2E: local/CI mocked-vendor suite across marketing/legal, auth, intake, MDI dashboard states, billing timing, accessibility, responsive, and scoped visual checks.
- Staging smoke: deployed-environment checks using only synthetic non-PHI accounts and approved secret-store configuration.

## Safety Boundaries
- No real PHI, clinical questionnaire answers, secrets, or live patient data in committed fixtures.
- MDI, Stripe, and Cognito are mocked by default for local/CI runs unless a ticket explicitly marks staging smoke behavior.
- Stripe metadata assertions must use only opaque IDs and enforce `docs/stripe-data-policy.md`.
- Intake specs must include explicit no-local-answer-retention assertions after submit-to-MDI handoff.

## Coverage Map
- T-085: harness, scripts, artifacts, fixture safety.
- T-086: public marketing/legal/compliance pages.
- T-087: Cognito-safe auth and protected-route flows.
- T-088: intake, consent, eligibility, and no-answer-retention.
- T-089: MDI-backed dashboard and care-workflow states.
- T-090: Stripe billing timing and no-PHI metadata invariants.
- T-091: accessibility, responsive, and focused visual regression checks.
- T-092: CI integration, staging smoke, and production launch gate.
title: Playwright E2E suite plan
